introSection: FireChaser Express is a steel launched roller coaster located at Dollywood in Pigeon Forge, Tennessee, USA. It was built by Gerstlauer and features two launches, two helices and six zero-g moments. The ride cost $15 million.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The ride opened on March 22, 2014. It replaced the Adventure Mountain ropes course and reused several of its towers as thematic elements.

sections.title: Color scheme
sections.content: FireChaser Express has an emerald green track and gray supports.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 3 trains with 7 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 14 riders per train.

fullText:
FireChaser Express is a steel launched roller coaster located at Dollywood in Pigeon Forge, Tennessee, USA. It was built by Gerstlauer and features two launches, two helices and six zero-g moments. The ride cost $15 million.

The ride opened on March 22, 2014. It replaced the Adventure Mountain ropes course and reused several of its towers as thematic elements.



FireChaser Express has an emerald green track and gray supports.

3 trains with 7 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 14 riders per train.
